disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known spinal cord injury with a long-standing bladder that does not empty normally, usually managed by a timed toileting schedule (patient baseline)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions?
How is your bladder normally managed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got a spinal cord injury and I'm in a wheelchair. My bladder doesn't work properly because of it, so I normally stick to a fixed toileting schedule.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pounding headache with drenching sweating and flushing of the face and upper body coming on acutely (dysreflexia triad)
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache and the sweating.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Out of nowhere tonight I got this pounding headache, I'm drenched in sweat and my face and neck have gone all red and flushed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two days of progressive difficulty passing urine, now continuous painless overflow dribbling soaking the pads
trigger_question_examples: How has your urine been over the last couple of days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about two days I've struggled to pass water, and now it just dribbles out on its own all the time and soaks the pads without me feeling it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rock-hard, tense, distended lower abdomen extending toward the umbilicus
trigger_question_examples: Does your tummy feel swollen or hard?
Can your carer see any swelling in your lower belly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My lower belly has gone rock hard and swollen — my carer says it's tense and bulging up toward my belly button.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absent bladder sensation — no feeling of fullness or urge because of the neurological deficit
trigger_question_examples: Can you feel when your bladder is full?
Do you get any urge to pass water?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — because of my spinal injury I can't feel my bladder at all, so I never get a warning that it's full.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urine has become cloudy and malodorous (possible urinary infection as a trigger)
trigger_question_examples: Has the colour or smell of your urine changed?
Does the urine look cloudy or smell strong?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, my carer says the urine's gone cloudy and it smells really strong and bad tonight.

deflection_behaviours.description: Because the abdomen is not painful (sensory deficit), the patient may downplay how serious the distension is.
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: If asked about abdominal pain, the patient reports it does not hurt.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: It doesn't actually hurt — I can't feel much down there — but it's definitely rock hard and swollen.
